docs.title: 🚀 DevOps Automation Labs
docs.text:
Your central hub for DevOps automation demos, hands-on labs, and comprehensive resources

Get Started View on GitHub

docs.title: 📚 Explore Our Resources
docs.text:
• DevOps Loop End-to-End Demo

    Master the complete DevOps Loop with hands-on labs and AI-powered demonstrations. Learn Plan, Control, Build, Deploy, Test, Secure, Measure, and Release capabilities.

    Explore DevOps Loop

    View Demo Application

  • DevOps Velocity & ELM Demo

    Discover how DevOps Velocity integrates with Engineering Lifecycle Management (ELM) to provide comprehensive insights and orchestration across your DevOps toolchain.

    Get Started with Velocity

  • DevOps Test & ELM Demo

    Learn how to integrate testing capabilities with Engineering Lifecycle Management for comprehensive quality assurance and test automation.

    Explore DevOps Test

  • DevOps Solution Workbench

    TechXchange 2025 Lab 2663: Experience the power of AI-driven DevOps automation with the Solution Workbench platform.

    Start Lab 2663

docs.title: 🎯 What You'll Find Here
docs.text:
Comprehensive Learning

All resources include detailed documentation, step-by-step guides, and practical examples to help you master DevOps automation.

Hands-On Experience

Every demo and lab is designed for hands-on learning with real-world scenarios and working applications.

AI-Powered Innovation

Explore cutting-edge AI integration in DevOps workflows, including AI assistants and intelligent automation.

docs.title: 🌟 Key Features
docs.text:
• Detailed Documentation

    Comprehensive guides with screenshots, code examples, and best practices

  • Interactive Labs

    Hands-on exercises that reinforce learning through practical application

  • Demo Applications

    Working sample applications to demonstrate real-world scenarios

  • Open Source

    All resources are freely available on GitHub for learning and contribution

docs.title: 🚦 Getting Started
docs.text:
New to DevOps Loop?Exploring Velocity?Testing Focus?

Start with our comprehensive End-to-End Demo to understand the complete DevOps lifecycle:

  1. Introduction - Learn the fundamentals
  2. Demo Flows - Follow guided demonstrations
  3. Hands-On Labs - Practice with real tools
  4. Setup Guides - Configure your environment

Begin Your Journey

Discover how DevOps Velocity provides insights and orchestration:

  1. Value Stream Management - Visualize your pipeline
  2. Integration Hub - Connect your tools
  3. Analytics & Insights - Measure performance
  4. Automation - Streamline workflows

Explore Velocity

Learn comprehensive testing strategies with DevOps Test:

  1. Test Automation - Automate your testing
  2. Quality Gates - Ensure quality standards
  3. ELM Integration - Connect to lifecycle management
  4. Reporting - Track test results

Start Testing

docs.title: 💡 Why DevOps Automation Labs?
docs.text:
Our mission is to provide practical, hands-on resources that help teams master DevOps automation. Whether you're:

  • 🎓 Learning DevOps practices and tools
  • 🏢 Implementing DevOps in your organization
  • 🎤 Demonstrating DevOps capabilities to stakeholders
  • 🔧 Experimenting with new automation techniques

You'll find valuable resources tailored to your needs.

docs.text:
